channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Fender American Ultra Jazz Bass with Maple Fretboard 2023 - Mystic Pine — $2,100
item.description:
$2,100 · Excellent · LB Bass Wrx.

Beautiful Ultra jazz bass , CME exclusive. Ships with original case and all case candy.

item.title: Cort C5PLUSOVMHABB Artisan Series C5 Plus OVMH 5 String Bass Guitar, Antique Brown Burst — $387.99
item.description:
$387.99 · Mint · Capital Music Gear

Ovangkol Top on Mahogany Wings with Maple Core -The luxurious aesthetics of Ovangkol consisting of cinnamon-brown with darker streaks of color is hard to resist. Known as a great overall tone wood, Ovangkol shares similar tone characteristics as Rosewood and Bubinga with a slightly fuller midrange and a top end that?s not quite bright sounding, but the strategically placed maple in the center makes up for the missing highs. The combination of Ovangkol top and Maple core, together with warmer sounding Mahogany wings provides a perfect mixture of balanced tone. Bartolini MK-1 Pickups -Delivers plenty of punchy and warm mids along with transparent and brilliant highs for a superbly balanced sound. Markbass MB-1 Preamp -Provides a very natural and transparent boost that does not color the organic nature or resonance of the instrument?s woods. The combination of crystal clarity and natural warmth exudes a passive feel with smooth lows, full-bodied mids, and bell-like highs. MetalCraft M Bridge -Developed with more focus on ease-of-use and greater tone transfer. Depending on the thickness of the strings, the dual string loading system allows the strings to be loaded either through the body or from the top to find the best optimal string tension, resulting in enhanced sustain, greater playability and focused sound. Another big improvement for the tone transfer is the deep individual slots that hold the saddles rock-tight, preventing any unwanted movement and allows string vibrations to correctly transfer to the body. MetalCraft M4 & M5 now come with string spacing of 19? (M4) and 0.750? (18?),(M5). Canadian Hard Maple Neck -The stiffness provides stability and contributes punch and brilliance to the overall tone of the instrument. Ergonomic Body Shape -A rounder body shape is applied for the iconic unified look that the premium Artisan Series are known for, also providing much better ergonomic comfort.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Sterling 4 H 1993 - 2018 — $1,600
item.description:
$1,600 · Very Good · Jon's Gear Garage

Up for grabs is an amazing 1993 Musicman Sterling 4H. Has some wear but in great shape for its age. Plays and sounds wonderful. Comes with hard case.

item.title: G&L Guitars Tribute Series LB-100 Bass Guitar - Olympic White — $649.99
item.description:
$649.99 · Brand New · Flipside Music

G&L Guitars Tribute Series LB-100 Bass Guitar -  Olympic White

The G&L LB•100 made its debut in the early '90s ago in response to bassists asking for more subtle evolution of the p-style platform, as compared to the SB-1 and L-1000. With a slightly streamlined body shape for improved comfort and balance, the LB•100 also brought the G&L Saddle Lock bridge for richer note definition and sustain. The Tribute Series LB•100 hits the mark, with an ideal balance to the pickup spec for vintage flavor with solid punch.


Features

Split-Coil Alnico 5 pickup for the “best of” classic tones, supported by Leo Fender’s innovative Saddle Lock bridge for improved presence and sustain. 


Specifications
  • CONSTRUCTION: bolt-on
  • SCALE: 34"
  • PICKUPS: G&L Alnico split-coil pickup
  • BODY WOOD: Poplar
  • NECK WOOD: Maple Fingerboard
  • NECK WIDTH AT NUT: 1 3/4"
  • NECK RADIUS: 9 1/2”
  • NECK PROFILE: medium C
  • FRETS: medium jumbo, nickel
  • TUNING KEYS: Traditional open-back
  • BRIDGE: Leo Fender-designed G&L Saddle-Lock™
  • ELECTRONICS: master volume, master tone

item.title: Gold Tone M-Bass Micro 23" Scale Acoustic/Electric Bass 2010s - Natural — $336
item.description:
$336 · Excellent · Michael's Gear Emporium

Like new Gold Tone Micro Bass and gig back.

item.title: Fender Player II Modified Active Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2025 - Present - Olympic Pearl — $1,059.52
item.description:
$1,059.52 · Excellent · Charlie19

I bought this bass in november 2025 and have barely played it and I need to thin the heard. It’s in almost perfect condition with one tiny dent which you can see on the third to last picture. It’s also got two brand new batteries as I didn’t use the active electronics for the few months that I played it. Please feel free to message if you have any further questions.

item.title: AriaPro 2 Cardinal Series CSB-380 1981 - Black — $543.89
item.description:
$543.89 · Excellent · Aldo’s Gear Outlet

Vintage 1981 Aria Pro II Cardinal Series CSB-380 bass guitar in black finish. Made in Japan and in great overall condition for its age. Fully working and plays well with a comfortable neck and classic vintage Japanese bass tone.

This bass shows only light age-related wear and has been well looked after. Electronics working correctly, neck feels straight, and hardware is original-looking. A fantastic example of an early 80s Aria Pro II bass that’s becoming increasingly sought after.

Features:

  • Made in Japan
  • Cardinal Series CSB-380
  • Black gloss finish
  • 4-string
  • Passive pickups
  • Rosewood fretboard
  • Vintage 1981 model

Perfect for collectors, recording, gigging, or anyone looking for a quality vintage Japanese bass.

Please check photos carefully for overall condition. Happy to answer questions or provide additional pictures.

item.title: Fender Adam Clayton Jazz Bass in Sherwood Green Metallic US26024740 — $2,399.99
item.description:
$2,399.99 · Brand New · The Music Gallery of Highland Park

Throughout the entire phenomenal history of the band, the groundbreaking music of U2 has been underpinned by the gracefully muscular bass work of Adam Clayton. His impeccable groove and expansive tone form the sonic foundation of one of the biggest bands in the history of rock music, never more powerfully than today. Fender's Adam Clayton Jazz Bass puts his rock-solid sound and style in your hands, with elegant appointments and elemental tone, including two potent Fender Custom Shop pickups and a beautiful Sherwood Green Metallic gloss finish with matching headstock.

Specs

Fender
Adam Clayton Jazz Bass
Sherwood Green Metallic Finish
Weighs 9 lbs 4 oz
Alder Body Material
Maple Neck Material
Rosewood Fingerboard
9.5" Fingerboard Radius
Medium Jumbo Frets
White Pearloid Block Fingerboard Inlays
1.5" Nut Width
Synthetic Bone Nut Material
34" Scale Length
Custom Shop 60s Jazz Bass Pickup Set
2 x Volume Controls
Master Tone
Fender Hipshot Lollipop Tuners
HiMass Bridge
Original Hardshell Case
MODEL #: 0190090846
UPC #: 885978544073

item.title: Fnder Custom Shop 1966 Jazz Bass Relic Charcoal Frost Metallic Masterbuilt Dale Wilson 2011 — $7,999
item.description:
$7,999 · Excellent · The Music Zoo

This beautiful bass is a 2011 Fender Custom Shop '66 Jazz Bass, Masterbuilt by the talented and now very in demand Dale Wilson! The bass features a highly figured 2A flame maple neck with a bound rosewood fretboard and vintage-specs for the fret size and radius. There are two Custom Shop Jazz Bass pickups, and an aftermarket set of Hipshot tuners installed. There are some extra bits of wear to the body in addition to the relic work, and screw holes exposed from the bridge cover. The bass includes the original case and COAs - two of the latches need to be replaced but the others function and it protects the bass in transit.
  • Solidbody Electric Bass
  • Relic Charcoal Frost Metallic Finish
  • Alder Body
  • Quartersawn 2A Flame Maple Neck 
  • Bound Rosewood Fretboard
  • 34" Scale Length
  • 7.25" Fretboard Radius
  • 1.5" Nut Width
  • Vintage Frets
  • Custom Shop  Jazz Bass Pickups
  •  Volume 1. (Middle Pickup), Volume 2. (Bridge Pickup), Master Tone 
  • Aftermarket Hipshot Tuners Installed
  • Nickel Hardware
  • 8 lbs, 7 oz.
  • .790" Neck Thickness at 1st Fret
  • 1.00" Neck Thickness at 12th Fret

Includes: Original Hardshell Case, Certificates of Authenticity

item.title: Fender American Vintage II 1966 Jazz Bass Guitar in Lake Placid Blue — $2,699.99
item.description:
$2,699.99 · Brand New · The Music Gallery of Highland Park

The Fender® American Vintage II series presents a remarkably accurate take on the revolutionary designs that altered the course of musical history. Built with period-accurate bodies, necks, and hardware, premium finishes, and meticulously voiced, year-specific pickups, each instrument captures the essence of authentic Fender craftsmanship and tone.

When Don Randall at Fender Sales requested a more sophisticated, high-end bass model, the now iconic Jazz Bass® was the result. The neck was narrower at the nut, providing a faster and more effortless feel, and the sleek new body style mirrored the offset contoured style of the Jazzmaster®. By 1966, the evolution of the instrument reached new heights with striking new features.

The American Vintage II 1966 Jazz Bass features a comfortable "U" shape hard rock maple neck, and it plays like a dream with a 7.25" radius round-lam rosewood fingerboard and vintage tall frets. Characteristic of production in 1966, this J-Bass® is offered with white neck binding, pearl dots, two volume controls with master tone, a matching painted headstock, and a 4-ply tortoiseshell pickguard. The 4-saddle bridge with threaded saddles, vintage-style "lollipop" tuners and Pure Vintage '66 Jazz Bass pickups delivers classic thump and style.

The instruments in the American Vintage II series are direct descendants of the original Fenders: designed for players with a fine appreciation for vintage Fender tone and feel and built with unmatched quality, down to the last screw. These are Fender electrics in their purest form: Fender American Vintage II, the stuff of legends.

Specs

Fender
American Vintage II Series
1966 Jazz Bass
Lake Placid Blue Finish - Gloss Nitrocellulose
Matching Headstock
Alder Body Material
Weighs 9 lbs 2 oz
Maple Neck Material
U-Shape Neck Profile
Rosewood Fingerboard - Bound
Vintage Tall Frets
7.25" Fingerboard Radius
1.5" Nut Width
Bone Nut Material
34" Scale Length
2 x Volume Controls
1 Master Tone
Pure Vintage 66 Single Coil Jazz Bass Pickups
Pure Vintage Lollipop Tuners
Pure Vintage 4 Saddle Bridge
Original Hardshell Case

item.title: Fender Flea Jazz Bass Shell Pink — $1,880
item.description:
$1,880 · Excellent · Drews Gear

Mint.

item.title: 2026 Ibanez 250th USA Anniversary Premium SR4A250 — $1,199.99
item.description:
$1,199.99 · Brand New · New York Music Emporium

Show off your American pride with this limited-edition SR4A250 from Ibanez, designed to commemorate the USA's 250th anniversary and honor the legacy of American guitarists. Sporting vivid splatters of red, white, and blue over its African mahogany body and headstock, a rock-solid 5-piece panga panga/purpleheart bolt-on neck, and a bound panga panga fingerboard, the Premium SR4A250 is a boutique-quality instrument with impeccable playability. That quality is borne out of its pair of aggressive Nordstrand Big Break pickups, which deliver massive, roaring tone infused with monumental sustain. The 5-piece neck is reinforced with KTS titanium rods, with premium Gotoh tuners on one end and a resounding MR5S bridge at the other. Ibanez's Custom Electronics 3-band EQ completes the setup, ensuring your onboard bass-shaping capabilities provide the control you need to craft the perfect tone. Whether you're playing July 4 showcases or big-stage, patriotic performances, the Ibanez 250th USA Anniversary SR4A250 is a collector’s piece that sounds just as impressive as it looks.

Features:

  • Model: SR4A250
  • Number of Strings: 4
  • Left-/Right-handed: Right-handed
  • Body Type: Solidbody
  • Body Shape: Doublecut
  • Body Material: African Mahogany
  • Color: 250th USA Anniversary
  • Body Finish: Satin Polyurethane
  • Neck Material: 5-piece Panga/Purpleheart
  • Neck Finish: Satin Polyurethane
  • Neck Shape: Atlas-4
  • Neck Joint: Bolt-on
  • Radius: 12"
  • Fingerboard Material: Bound Panga
  • Fingerboard Inlay: Blocks
  • Number of Frets: 24
  • Fret Type: Medium
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Scale Length Type: Standard-scale
  • Nut Width: 1.496"
  • Nut Material: Graph Tech Black Tusq XL
  • Bridge/Tailpiece: Ibanez MR55
  • Hardware Finish: Black
  • Tuners: Gotoh Machine Heads
  • Neck Pickup: Nordstrand Big Break Split-coil
  • Bridge Pickup: Nordstrand Big Break Split-coil
  • Controls: 1 x Volume, 1 x Balnacer, 3-band EQ
  • Switching: EQ Bypass Switch, 3-way Mid Frequency Switch
  • Strings: .045-.105
  • Case/Gig Bag: Gig Bag

item.title: Fender American Vintage II '60 Precision Bass 2022 - Present - Daphne Blue — $2,419.99
item.description:
$2,419.99 · Brand New · IHOMI

100% new and completely unplayed. Includes hardcase and all case candy weighs 8.7 pounds! Includes free shipping.

The Fender® American Vintage II series presents a remarkably accurate take on the revolutionary designs that altered the course of musical history. Built with period-accurate bodies, necks and hardware, premium finishes and meticulously voiced, year-specific pickups, each instrument captures the essence of authentic Fender craftsmanship and tone.

The late '50s to the early '60s was a watershed period in the development of the Precision Bass®, a time of transition that would see the introduction of many new appointments that would become synonymous with the P-Bass®. By 1960, the design of the P-bass had eclipsed the earlier cues culled from the Telecaster® - now the P-bass had a Strat®-style headstock shape, comfort-contours, pickguard mounted electronics and 4-saddle bridge. Adorned in 3-Color Sunburst and topped with a 4-ply tortoiseshell pickguard, the 1960 Precision Bass represented a more refined, enduring aesthetic for the model.

Featuring a premium alder body, Pure Vintage '60 Split-Coil P-Bass pickup and a substantial "C" shape hard rock maple neck mated with a 7.25" radius slab rosewood fingerboard, the American Vintage II 1960 Precision Bass reproduces the quintessential tone and feel of the original.

The instruments in the American Vintage II series are direct descendants of the original Fenders: designed for players with a fine appreciation for vintage Fender tone and feel and built with unmatched quality, down to the last screw. These are Fender electrics in their purest form: Fender American Vintage II, the stuff of legends.

item.title: Hawkes & Son Concert Double Bass 1907 - Brown — $30,000
item.description:
$30,000 · Very Good · Nick's Gear Depot

This Hawkes & Son Concert double bass has been very well maintained and sounds great. It features the generous proportions and giant shoulders of all Hawkes double basses, and for its size is quite easy to play with a good setup. Pushes a lot of air, sounds big and authoritative pizzicato or bowed. Would push an orchestra section or a big band.

Some Hawkes & Son History:

The instruments manufactured by Hawkes & Son (the name adopted in 1889) during the latter quarter of the 19th Century and the first half of the 20th century were often supplied to the many army and military bands that existed, especially in England. While mainly brass instruments, all of the violin family instruments were imported and sold though the Hawkes and Son workshop. There were three grades of double basses, namely Professor (flat back), Concert and Panormo (round carved backs) almost all based on the model of Vincenzo Panormo’s instruments.

All the models are characterized by their violin outline, deep ribs and generous proportions. The Professor was a flat back model with upper angle break, and often outside linings, while the Concert and Panormo were produced with full swell backs.

item.title: Aria Pro II Electric Jet Bass Guitar Black J-BBK — $346.09
item.description:
$346.09 · Brand New · Music Bits Company

The Aria Pro II Jet Bass is the ideal instrument to explore the world of bass guitar.

Manufactured by one of the most respected names in bass guitar, this instrument is well thought out - featuring quality workmanship and materials to deliver a great experience for the player.

Featuring a poplar body, maple neck with rosewood finger board and two single coil pickups, this instrument has it all. Classic good looks, smooth playability and most importantly - great sound.

Supplied by an authorised Aria Pro Dealer.

Specification:

Body: Poplar 
Neck: Maple, Bolt-on 
Fingerboard: Rosewood 
Number of Frets: 22 
Scale Length: 813mm 
Pickups: OJ-5 Single Coil x 2 (Alnico-5) 
Controls: Volume x1, Tone x1, PU Selector x1 
Bridge: VFB-1C
Hardware: Chrome
Finishes: Black

item.title: Squier Used Classic Vibe Bass VI, '23 — $350
item.description:
$350 · Very Good · Dave's Guitar Shop

Very Good condition, Black, Tuned E to E one octave down, Gloss polyurethane body finish, Poplar body, C shaped Maple neck with a bound 9.5” radius Indian Laurel fingerboard, White Pearloid Block inlays and narrow tall frets, 30” scale length, 1 11/16th" nut width, Fender designed Alnico single coil pickups, Master volume and tone controls with the three on/off slide switches for each pickup plus the two position slide switch for the bass-cut "strangle" circuit, Six saddle vintage style bridge and non-locking floating vibrato, Vintage style tuners, Neck Thickness is .83" at the 1st fret and .92" at the 12th, 9.2 pounds, No case included.

Condition Notes: Tremolo arm not included, there are light scratches/swirls on the body.

item.title: Fender Player II Jazz Bass - Black w/Maple — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · Dave's Guitar Shop

From Fender:

"Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Jazz Bass® — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Jazz Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil J bass® pickups offer sweet highs, growling mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Jazz Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers."

Black, Made in Mexico, Gloss polyester body finish, Alder body, Modern C shaped Maple neck with a 9.5" radius Maple fingerboard and medium jumbo frets, 34" scale length, 1.5" nut width, Player series alnico 5 single coil Jazz Bass bridge and neck pickups with the volume/volume/tone controls, Standard bridge with the barrel steel saddles, Standard open gear tuners, 9.6 pounds, Case not included

item.title: Gibson Thunderbird IV 2012-- Vintage Sunburst — $1,785
item.description:
$1,785 · Very Good · Mcswain 's Gear Depot

In very good condition. A small amount of belt scratch on back. almost unnoticeable clear chip on back of head stock. All paperwork included.

item.title: Hofner Shorty Short-Scale Violin Bass - CT — $219
item.description:
$219 · Excellent · Atomic Music

This is a pre-owned/used instrument available as shown for local delivery, pickup at our storefront (curbside or in store) in Beltsville, Maryland, or shipment to those in the lower 48/USA only via UPS Ground [a signature will be required for delivery]*.

  • Its electronics have been tested and function 100% as they should.
  • See the provided pix for best idea of overall cosmetic condition. As it is pre-owned, it has acquired surface marks and wear (dings, dents, scratches, scuffs, smudges, etc.) from play/use - all purely cosmetic in nature. There are no issues to note with regard to functionality and playability.
  • A generic gig bag [not pictured] will be included.  No other extras are available for this item.
  • This listing has been created for the benefit of our local customers.  There may be cosmetic or functional issues that the pictures alone cannot capture — if you are not able to come by and inspect this instrument in person, please be sure to ask any relevant questions you may have regarding its condition, playability, etc. before buying.

* Please be aware that humidity, temperature, and handling can affect guitars & basses such that adjustments to the instrument might be needed post-shipment. This includes "fret sprout" (as wood can shrink/swell during shipment, a fretted instrument may arrive with sharp fret edges). If tweaking action, intonation, etc., having fret edges dressed, or having the instrument set up to your specs is not something you are comfortable with doing yourself, you will need the help of a local-to-you tech/professional. Note that any associated fees incurred for their time and labor will be your responsibility.

Please contact us to discuss any other questions you may have about it before clicking the "Add To Cart" button!


Atomic Music store hours:  12pm - 6pm, EST, Monday - Saturday & 12pm - 5pm, EST, Sundays.

Thanks!!

- Atomic Music

item.title: Cozart P-Bass Style Electric Bass Guitar — $125
item.description:
$125 · Excellent · Arabi Music Supply

Barely used; like-new condition. Plays and sounds like an "P-Bass" style bass. Nice flamed finish. Includes gig bag.

item.title: Fender Precision Bass 1973 w/OHSC — $2,971.29
item.description:
$2,971.29 · Good · HOWE SOUND

A mostly original 1973 Fender Precision Bass in good condition. Sounds and feels amazing to play. Non-original details :


- The bass has been refinished at some point, in one of the pictures under the pick guard you can see the original olympic white

- New pots have been installed, but the original pots will be included and would be easy to re-install.

- Missing the thumb rest and bridge/pickup covers.


Otherwise everything is straight 70’s goodness. Maple neck, weighs 8.5lbs which is on the lighter side for this era. Comes with the original hardshell case in excellent condition. Currently strung with flatwounds.


Will ship fully insured.

item.title: Gibson EB-3 in Cherry 1967 — $1,499.99
item.description:
$1,499.99 · Fair · The Guitar Department

This bass is in overall fair condition. The neck is straight and the frets show moderate wear, they are no major divots but the frets are lower. The electronics function properly and quietly. This bass has had multiple repairs to the body and neck joint. There are visible repairs near the controls and around the neck joint. There is finish checking and scuffs across a majority of the body. The edges of the body have chips/dings. The back of the body has buckle rash and deeper scuffs. There is a series of small dings running down the back of the neck and the finish is worn. The bridge cover is missing. The hardware shows pitting and oxidation. Please reference the photos for physical condition, as they are part of the item description.


This bass weighs 7lb 10oz.


SPECS:

  • Body- Mahognay
  • Neck- Mahogany
  • Fretboard- Rosewood
  • Scale Length- 30.5"
  • Number of Frets- 20
  • Inlays- Dots
  • Pickup Configuration- HH
  • Controls- 2 Vol, 2 Tone and 4-Way Varitone

*QM*

$2,800 · Excellent · Yard Sale Metals

This is a Fender Jazz Bass featuring a sleek black finish and a traditional 4-string configuration. This guitar has scratches and blemishes as shown but otherwise in good condition.

item.title: Yamaha TRB1006J 6-String Electric Bass - Natural Quilt — $999
item.description:
$999 · Excellent · Markle Sparkle Music

In like new condition, with gorgeous woods and a fresh setup, this instrument is ready to play.

A beautifully maintained Yamaha TRB1006J six‑string bass for a fraction of the new price. You can't find a lower price on Reverb or eBay.

Frets are clean, neck is straight, hardware shines, and the finish looks showroom‑fresh.

* Tight, fat and full low‑end response

* Wide tonal range

* Premium woods: Maple, Alder, Rosewood

* Active electronics

* Signature TRB clarity.

Perfect for players who want boutique‑level feel and tone without the boutique price. Free shipping within the Continental US.

item.title: Used Ibanez AEB20E-TKS Acoustic Electric Bass Guitar — $219.98
item.description:
$219.98 · Very Good · Music Go Round - Bradenton

Used Ibanez AEB20E-TKS Acoustic Bass Guitar

Very good condition

Local pickup

item.title: ESP LTD John Campbell JC-4 - Dark Grey Metallic Satin w/ Case (LJC4DGMS) — $2,099
item.description:
$2,099 · Brand New · Musician Madness

with case  

As a founding member of Lamb of God, John Campbell has been the source of the powerful low end for this famed American heavy metal band since 1994. His LTD Signature Series JC-4 bass offers all of the quality, playing feel, and tone that you’ll need for any kind of music where bass is essential. Based on the ESP Stream body shape, the JC-4 has bolt-on construction at 34” scale, using a swamp ash body and five-piece maple/purple heart neck with a fast-playing thin-u neck contour. The Macassar ebony fingerboard includes 21 extra-jumbo frets, split block inlays, and glow-in-the-dark side markers. This well-balanced bass includes high-end components like Hipshot Ultralight tuners and a Hipshot A Style bridge with slotted saddles. The sound of the JC-4 is powered by a set of Fishman SB-1 active pickups. These are versatile multi-voice pickups that offer flexible tone sculpting with excellent dynamic range and articulation. Its controls include volume with push-pull to engage single-coil mode, bass/treble stacked 2-band EQ, and a 3-way mini toggle switch to select between three pickup voicings. Includes deluxe hardshell form-fit ESP case.

Construction Bolt-On Scale 34" Body Swamp Ash Neck 5Pc Maple/Purple Heart Fingerboard Macassar Ebony Fingerboard Radius 400mm Finish Dark Grey Metallic Satin Nut Width 38mm Nut Type Molded Neck Contour Thin U Frets/Type 21 XJ Hardware Color Black Strap Button Standard Tuners Hipshot Ultralite Bridge Hipshot A Style "Slotted Saddles" Bridge PU Fishman Fluence SB-1 *(Pull Volume for Single Coil Mode) Neck PU Fishman Fluence SB-1 *(Pull Volume for Single Coil Mode) Electronics Active Electronics Layout Volume(Push/Pull)/Balance/Fishman 2-Band EQ(Stack)/3-Way Mini switch Voice Select Strings D'Addario XL165 (.045/.065/.085/.105) Case Case Included Y

item.title: Fender American Standard Jazz Bass Fretless 2015 - 3-Color Sunburst — $1,399
item.description:
$1,399 · Excellent · J's Boutique

Like new (almost never played)

with original case and all case candy.

Lined fretless fingerboard

Excellent condition. Great for a collection or as a player's instrument.

Please review all photos carefully before purchasing. The instrument is fully tested, professionally packed, and shipped with tracking and insurance. Serial number and condition are documented before shipment. All sales are final. Feel free to contact me with any questions

item.title: Squier Affinity Jazz Bass VI - Metallic Black — $298
item.description:
$298 · Excellent · The PriceMaster

Fender finally did it, they made a six-string Jazz Bass! Well, a Chinese-made Squier Affinity six-string Jazz Bass.

Despite my excitement to try this out, it was a string too far for me. I had fun fumbling my way through some chords and invading my guitarist's frequency territories, but I decided I'll stick to four and five strings for now. So this bass is available for the next intrepid six-string explorer or for the established six-stringer who needs a surprisingly playable bass for a great value.

I bought this new and didn't put much milage on it, so there's no real damage or wear to report. I do not have a bag or case for this.

Will ship to the continental US. Local pickup is available in Chicago at the West Town library branch. Everything is for sale - make me an offer.

item.title: Yamaha BB-4N 90's - Natural — $350
item.description:
$350 · Good · Ranch Gear

1990's Yamaha BB-N4 II 4 string Bass.
The bass is in good condition showing minimal battle scaring for it's age, is ready to go and is in need of nothing.
Alder body
Maple neck
24 fret ebony fingerboard (I've seen another with an ebony board but they're usually rosewood)
Frets are in excellent condition, the action is set low and playability is very comfortable.
The truss rod functions as it should.
Tuners are original, work smoothly and don't slip.
Set up with D'Addario .050 - .105 round wounds.
The bridge is a Hipshot
The pickups are Seymour Duncan Hot Jazz (Neck & Bridge)
The pots are 250K Bourns with an .047 Orange Drop cap.
The knobs are maple.
Comes with a decent Levy's GigBag.

item.title: Warwick RockBass Corvette $$ 5 Fretless 2020 - Present - Nirvana Black — $950
item.description:
$950 · Excellent · The PriceMaster

Fretless 5-string Warwick RockBass Corvette $$ in excellent used condition. This bass sounds massive and the transparent black finish looks great.

This hasn't seen a ton of play, so there isn't much wear to report. As-described, so please review the photos carefully.

Includes a nice padded Warwick branded gig bag. There is a tear near the gig bag handle, that was there when I bought the bass.

Weight: ~10 lbs.

Will ship to the continental US. Local Pickup can be arranged at the West Town Library branch in Chicago. Make Me An Offer.

item.title: Squier 40th Anniversary Vintage Edition pickups, control, plate, bridge, tuners, hardware Jazz Bass 2022 - Present - Satin Sea Foam Green — $115
item.description:
$115 · Excellent · Jared’s Catch and release

Pulled from a Sea Foam Green Squier 40th anniversary vintage edition Jazz.


Hardware is aged, all working. Includes everything pictured.

item.title: Gibson EB3 1962 - BROWN — $3,955.53
item.description:
$3,955.53 · Very Good · steven's gear outlet

Very good condition in good working order comes with original case

item.title: Fender American Professional II Precision Bass Left-Handed with Rosewood Fretboard 2020 - Present - Olympic White — $999
item.description:
$999 · Excellent · Thomas' Leftorium

Bought new in 2021 from Sweetwater. Has been kept in a climate-controlled home studio. No gigging, no modifications or alterations. Comes with all original accessories, including hardshell case and certificate of authenticity. It's currently equipped with La Bella 760FS strings. Comes in at 8lbs, 14ozs. Love this instrument, just need to thin the collection out a bit. Give this guy a good home!

item.title: Schecter C-4 Silver Mountain neck-thru active bass w/RoadRunner bag - green — $825
item.description:
$825 · Excellent · Guit-fiddle Shop

Ready to gig. Very clean cosmetically. Straight neck, low action, truss turns, frets are excellent, electronics are clean. New Dunlop Nickel Plated 45s. New 9V. Bag is new old stock. Ships to lower 48. No international. No P.O. boxes. No trades.

Return policy: happy to take a return if the item doesn't match the description&photos. If there's shipping damage we'll get it sorted quickly. But I can't take any more "bought this by mistake" returns. One-man operation here. The last straw was a guy who complained an item was "in too good condition". Anyway, please triple check your order before purchasing. Thanks for understanding.

item.title: Fender Mustang Bass 1966, Olympic White w/ OHC — $3,850
item.description:
$3,850 · Good · P. G. Wilz’s Gear Emporium

You're looking at a Fender Mustang Bass from the line's first run in 1966. It's a vintage bass that looks great for its age—about to celebrate its 60th birthday in September! It's a 30" short-scale with basically all original parts, the exception being the tug bar/thumb rest and "hootenanny" button on the back of the headstock. It has original pickups, electronics, pick guard, frets, nut and all else. The neck is straight and the truss rod works. Tons of mojo.

This was a player, so there are a few quirks. The original celluloid tortoise pick guard has the usual warping that comes with its age, but it's all in one piece and all the screws continue to fit. The bass has been refinished in Olympic White nitrocellulose by Schroom Custom Guitar Works in Vallejo, CA. This includes a matching headstock. It looks great. The bass continued to be played, and has the buckle rash and some forearm burn to show for it. The neck also seems to have had larger, rock maple inlays installed next to the original side dots for better low-light visibility. Again, it's a bass that has been played and wants to be played more.

It comes with the original hardshell case, which has been painted brown. Two of the latches need to be repaired, but the inside is in good condition. With some love it will do the trick. This Mustang is a short-scale, but it sounds big. The original split-coil pickup has wonderful depth to its tone, and the original pots are smooth and a joy to use.

item.title: Rickenbacker 4001C64 2001 - 2009 - Jetglo — $4.49
item.description:
$4.49 · Very Good · Giulia Mon

Basso Rickenbacker 4001-C64 del 2009 completamente originale, con la sua custodia rigida color argento, ben consetvato.

item.title: Ibanez SR500ALMHL SR Lefty 4-String Electric Bass, Mahogany Brown Burst Gloss — $799.99
item.description:
$799.99 · Brand New · Butler Music

The photos shown are actual photos of the bass you will be purchasing.

Weight – 7 lbs 6.87 oz

SR500AL-I251102369

For decades the SR has given bass players a modern alternative. With its continued popularity, Ibanez is constantly endeavoring to answer the wider needs of a variety of players, at a variety of budgets. But no matter what the specs, the heart is the same-SR continues to excite with its smooth, fast neck, lightweight body, and perfectly matched electronics.

****Product Features****

- 5pc Roasted Maple/Walnut neck
The Roasted Maple neck is heat-treated to increase stability, durability, moisture resistance and tolerance of temperature changes.

- Rosewood fretboard
Rosewood fretboard provides a well-balanced solid tone with a focused mid range.

- Medium frets
Medium sized frets enhance the accuracy of your notes.

- Okoume body
The Okoume body provides a bright and solid sound.

- Bartolini® BH2 pickups
The Bartolini® BH2 pickups provide a tight bottom-end, punchy mid-range, and smooth response. The dual-coil style configuration maximizes articulation and a long blade pole piece widens the magnetic field, providing balanced string-to-string pickup response.

- Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ
The Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ is our latest refinement on the concept of simple, straightforward, no-nonsense EQ control. The Boost and Cut for the Mid Control are each centered on slightly different frequencies, an innovation that delivers a preset range of the most favorable bass tones.

- MR5S bridge
The MR5S bridge has adjustable saddles for variable string spacing by +/- 1.5mm, answering every bassist’s specific string spacing needs.

- EQ bypass switch (passive tone control on treble pot)
The EQ bypass control offers precision tonal adjustments, including a switch to choose passive-only operation. When the EQ bypass is activated, the treble tone control knob becomes the global tone control for the passive circuit.

- 3-way Mid frequency switch
The 3-way Mid frequency switch allows players to choose from 3 Mid Frequency options and provides great tonal variety.

item.title: Fender Precision Bass Elite II 1983 - Black — $2,870.97
item.description:
$2,870.97 · Very Good · Tanne Bass Corner

I’m selling my May 1983 Fender Precision Elite II bass, in very well-preserved condition and with all original parts. Those of you familiar with these basses already know about the wide range of tonal options they offer. In addition, the micro-adjust bridge and the ultra-light tuners made by Schaller are a great feature.

However, the main difference that makes this bass unique lies in the following upgrades:

  • Conversion of the neck width from the stock 45 mm to a 39.79 mm nut width, typical of Jazz Bass models.
  • Conversion of the fingerboard radius from 7.25" to 10", making it much more comfortable to play.

The neck modification only affects the fingerboard and, consequently, the frets have been replaced with new ones, but it does not alter the overall C-shaped neck profile, which makes it a very comfortable bass to play.

All these modifications were carried out by a specialized luthier.

It includes an original Fender hard case in Tweed Deluxe finish.

Shipping costs are to be paid by the buyer. Located in Barcelona. Ships throughout Europe.

item.title: EKO VJB 3/4 Basso Elettrico — $199.71
item.description:
$199.71 · Brand New · E-Musicstore Strumenti Musicali Forli'

Caratteristiche

  • Body: Pioppo

  • Finitura: Lucida

  • Manico: Acero

  • Finitura: Satinata

  • Tastiera: Resina Eko WPC (Wood Polymers Composites)

  • Capotasto: 37,5mm

  • Scala ridotta: 761mm

  • Profilo: Low C

  • Tasti: 21 Medium Jumbo, 2,5mm

  • Ponte: Eko Jazz Bass style 4-corde

  • Pickup: 2x JB single coil

  • Controlli: 2x Volume + Tono

  • Meccaniche: Eko Bass

  • Corde Consigliate: Eko 45-105 Medium Set/4

  • Colore: Sunburst

  • Custodia: non inclusa

item.title: Warwick Corvette $$ 4 –LEFT HAND. Made in Germany (2010) — $1,794.35
item.description:
$1,794.35 · Very Good · Tanne Bass Corner

I’m selling my Warwick Corvette $$ 4-string bass, made in Germany in October 2010.

  • Serial number: J15509510

  • Finish: Natural Oil (light brown natural wood finish)

  • Body: Ash

  • Neck: 3-piece laminated Ovangkol

  • Fingerboard: Wenge

  • Fingerboard radius: 20"

  • 24 Jumbo brass frets



  • Nut: Just-A-Nut III (Tedur)

  • Scale: 34"

  • Adjustable string spacing: 19 mm (3/4")

Electronics

  • 2 MEC humbuckers ($$ configuration)

  • Active MEC 2-band preamp

  • Mini switches for series / parallel / single-coil modes

Very versatile bass, capable of powerful Music Man-style tones as well as clearer single-coil sounds.

Weight: 3,6Kg

The bass is in excellent condition, with all electronics and hardware working perfectly.
Straight neck and low action with no fret buzz.

item.title: Fender Flea jazz bass — $837.37
item.description:
$837.37 · Very Good · Michael in Berlin

Fender Flea Jazz bass. Original finish stripped off. Added Curtis Novak BS-DS pickup. Modified Babicz bridge. New string holder. Frets are mandolin-sized. Back of neck is sanded. Neck is straight and truss rod works fine. Minor dings and scratches. Plays and sounds great. Would prefer local pickup but can ship within EU. Can find a gig bag for it. Contact me if you have questions.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe Jaguar Bass Laurel Fingerboard 3-Color Sunburst (D12) (05426) — $369
item.description:
$369 · Excellent · Franklin Guitar Works

Weight - 8lb 12oz

The Classic Vibe Jaguar Bass turns up the volume on retro style, combining the iconic body shape of the Jaguar with the massive tone of its Fender-Designed alnico pickups. Player-friendly features include a medium 32 scale length, a slim, comfortable C-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets as well as a vintage-style bridge with slotted barrel saddles. Case not included.

This throwback Squier model also features 1970s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

SKU:0374560500


Franklin Guitar Works - Who We Are
FGW is a division of MIRC, LLC (Musical Instrument Reclamation Company), located in La Vergne, TN.  MIRC is the world’s largest refurbisher of stringed instruments.  We partner with the leading manufacturers in the industry, helping them recondition their distressed instruments. All of our instruments have been inspected, set up, and refurbished by our certified technicians to ensure you are receiving a quality instrument.

Hours of Operation
Our online Business hours are Monday - Friday 7:30 am to 4:00 pm CST. Closed on weekends and holidays.

Shipping Policy
Free ground shipping within the continental USA. Items under $20 will have a $9.95 shipping charge. We do not offer international shipping.
We cannot ship to a PO Box. Orders require a physical mailing address to be processed.
All orders over $500 will be shipped with a direct Signature Requirement to ensure it is received. If the signature requirement is refused, the customer will assume responsibility for the package once it reaches the delivery address.

Orders are processed Monday through Friday, 7:30am - 4:00pm CST. Shipments are prepared in the order that they are received. We make every effort to expedite orders as quickly as possible, but we cannot guarantee ship dates. Please allow up to 3 business days for tracking information. 

Thank you for trusting us with your business.

item.title: Fender Player II Jazz Bass 4 String Electric Bass Guitar Rallye Orange Finish — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Mint · The Music Farm

The bass pictured is the actual bass you will receive! 

At The Farm, we take actual pictures of each instrument and make sure they are fully set-up and ready to play before we ship them. Each instrument goes through a multi-point inspection, followed by a set-up process by our in-house tech staff. We then photograph each instrument with high-quality equipment in our on-site photography studio. We know that details like wood grain and color finishes can vary, so we want you to be able to see, to the best of our ability, exactly what you will be receiving. 

This process takes over an hour for each instrument - from inspection to pictures. We care about the instrument we put into your hands! Rest assured your guitar was not just plucked off of a shelf and drop-shipped to you from a warehouse without care. 

This is a new, never owned bass with full manufacturer warranty. We have listed it as mint/open box because we have unboxed it to take actual photos to best represent what you will be receiving. 

Key Features

  • Brand: Fender
  • Product Warranty: 2 Year - USA Only
  • Actual Weight: 9lbs 1oz
  • Body Type: Solid Body
  • Body Shape: Jazz Bass
  • Body Material: Alder
  • Orientation: Right Handed
  • Neck Shape: Modern C
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Neck Joint: Bolt-On
  • Nut Width: 1.5 Inches - 38.1mm
  • Nut Material: Synthetic Bone
  • Scale Length: 34 Inches
  • Fretboard Radius: 9.5 Inches
  • Number of Frets: 20 Medium Jumbo 
  • Fretboard Material: Slab Rosewood
  • Fretboard Inlays: White Dot
  • Neck Pick-Up: Single-Coil
  • Neck Pick-Up Type: Player Series Alnico 5 Single-Coil Jazz Bass
  • Bridge Pick-Up: Single-Coil
  • Bridge Pick-Up Type: Player Series Alnico 5 Single-Coil Jazz Bass
  • Controls: Volume 1. (Middle Pickup), Volume 2. (Bridge Pickup), Master Tone
  • Bridge Type: 4-Saddle Standard
  • Tuning Machines: Standard Open-Gear
  • Pickguard: 3-Ply Mint Green
  • Serial: MX26061351
  • Color: Rallye Orange

*For your protection all purchases over $99 will be shipped signature required.

You are buying a quality instrument made of wood. Each instrument goes through a pre-shipment inspection to ensure you are getting a great quality instrument. However, please keep in mind when instruments are shipped, they can endure temperature changes as well as doing the "shipper shuffle" and therefore minor adjustments may be needed to set up the instrument to your personal preferences after receiving it.

Included in your shipment will be instructions on care and maintenance. 

We are musicians just like you and we want to help you Grow Your Passion®

The Music Farm is an Authorized Fender Dealer.

item.title: MTD Kingston ZX 5-String Electric Bass Guitar - Regular Deep Cherry Burst — $1,799.20
item.description:
$1,799.20 · B-Stock · Musician's Friend

** Item Specific Details ** Has minor scratches. ** This item was returned in great condition. It looks and plays like new, with only minor signs of use (slight scuffs, etc.).

The MTD Kingston ZX is a precision-crafted 5-string bass built for players who demand the feel, tone and refinement of a premium professional instrument—without compromise. As the flagship of the Kingston lineup, it brings together elite craftsmanship, sophisticated electronics and a performance-first ethos, channeling decades of MTD innovation in extended-range bass design. A resonant mahogany body paired with a striking figured maple top delivers both authority and definition, while the asymmetrical 35" maple neck with carbon-fiber reinforcement ensures comfort, stability and speed across all five strings. Add proprietary Bartolini USA electronics, Hipshot tuners and the Buzz Feiten Tuning System, and the Kingston ZX stands ready for the most demanding stages and studio sessions.

Mahogany Body With Figured Maple Top for Power and Precision

The tone of the Kingston ZX begins with a premium foundation. Mahogany adds rich, deep low end and natural warmth, while a figured maple top tightens the attack and enhances articulation where slap accents, chord voicings and melodic leads need to shine. Sleek body contours and refined ergonomics make extended sessions comfortable, and finish options like Gloss Trans Mocha and Satin Deep Cherry Burst deliver true boutique presence under stage lights. Whether the sound demands subtle support or commanding projection, this body construction delivers both voice and versatility.

Asymmetrical Maple Neck Built for Pro-Grade Stability and Comfort

MTD’s signature asymmetrical maple neck profile is engineered for fatigue-free performance. Slightly thinner on the treble side, it naturally follows the shape of the fretting hand, creating a fast and relaxed feel during extended sessions. Carbon-fiber reinforcement ensures rock-solid stability across the full 35" scale—critical for maintaining clarity and sustain on the low B. A 10"–14" compound-radius maple fingerboard supports fluid runs and clean chording across all 24 frets, while the Buzz Feiten Tuning System delivers consistently accurate intonation in every position.

Bartolini USA Electronics for Elevated Sonic Authority

The Kingston ZX earns its flagship status with a full Bartolini USA electronics package. Dual-coil soapbars provide a wide dynamic range, thick harmonic content and exceptional note separation—from thunderous fundamentals to articulate high-end detail. A Bartolini active three-band EQ offers ±12dB of premium boost and cut on bass, mids and treble, while the mid-frequency switch fine-tunes your punch and presence for any genre or room. From studio-clean precision to stage-shaking aggression, the ZX keeps your voice forward in the mix.

Road-Ready Hardware With Precision Engineering

The Kingston ZX is designed to take on the real demands of professional gigging. Hipshot Ultralite tuners eliminate neck dive while maintaining tuning integrity. The top-loading Quick Release bridge speeds up string swaps and enhances clarity and sustain. Combined with the ZX’s rigid neck construction and Buzz Feiten tuning accuracy, these features ensure consistency—night after night, show after show.

The Ultimate Expression of the Kingston Design Philosophy

For players who push the boundaries of modern bass, the MTD Kingston ZX delivers the full package: elevated tone, effortless playability and stage-worthy aesthetics. Designed by Michael Tobias and refined by skilled technicians in the U.S., it captures the spirit of MTD’s custom shop instruments while honoring the Kingston mission of accessibility. From high-energy touring to precision studio work, the ZX is the instrument you reach for when nothing but your best will do.

item.title: Ibanez BTB745 5-String Electric Bass Guitar Regular Low Gloss Natural — $799.99
item.description:
$799.99 · B-Stock · Musician's Friend

** Item Specific Details ** Light scratches and dents on the top and back of the body ** This item was returned in great condition. It looks and plays like new, with only minor signs of use (slight scuffs, etc.).
Evolving and perfecting, the Ibanez BTB series has always aimed at expanding the player’s full range of creative expression. The elegant, curving, massive body of select tone woods and dedicated equipment provide huge tones. Neck-through construction with a 35-in scale, a two-octave fretboard and a super-deep cutaway promise sleek playability and rich sustain. The BTB series defines what the “Boutique Bass” is all about.

The Ash wing body with a Walnut top/Mahogany back brings a superior sound attack and a firm low end. The 35-in. scale 5pc Wenge/Bubinga/Maple through-neck provide a tight low end and massive sustain. The Jatoba fretboard has Stainless Steel frets for bright tone, and with high durability. It also has a zero fret for accurate intonation and minimal string action—opening the string sound to be the same as other frets.

Electronics include Bartolini BH2 pickups for tight bottom end, a full mid range with a smooth response. Combined with the Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ w/3-way Mid frequency switch, the BTB745 allows tonal variation which covers from simple chord work to complex soloing. The Mono-rail V allows for a wider intonation adjustment range and each isolated bridge is securely locked down to the body for maximum vibration transfer without interference. D'Addario NYXL strings are installed to expand the dynamic range and harmonic response. It also includes a high-tech Neutrik locking output jack for stable and secure connections, preventing accidental disconnect or shock and vibration.

item.title: Load American Performer Mustang pickguard Bass with Maple Fretboard 2022 - Present - Honey Burst — $125
item.description:
$125 · Excellent · Jared’s Catch and release

Had this as part of a project but don’t need it anymore.

Includes everything shown American performer pickup, control plate (with grease bucket circuit), pickguard, screws.

item.title: Peavey Cirrus Natural 5 String Bass w/gigbag — $1,759.99
item.description:
$1,759.99 · Very Good · Ryan Fowler's Guitar Experience

Peavey Cirrus Natural 5 String Bass w/gigbag

Peavey's new Cirrus™ bass guitar lineup reintroduces the iconic 4- and 5-string models, blending high-end craftsmanship, exotic hardwoods, and powerful VFL humbuckers with 3-band active EQ. Reviving the beloved 1997 neck through design pioneered by master luthier Mike Powers, these basses feature a 35-inch scale for enhanced low end, Cirrus inlays, and gold hardware. With refined electronics and premium finishes, the Cirrus bass returns to offer a bold, modern evolution grounded in its respected legacy.

This bass is in very good to excellent condition with minor wear to the pickup cover and a couple blemishes on the headstock. It also comes with a ridged soft rectangle gigbag. 

Available now at Ryan Fowler’s Guitar Experience. Ryan Fowler's Guitar Experience is Baltimore's premier boutique guitar shop specializing in anything and everything guitar. We are an authorized dealer for dozens of exciting brands like PRS Guitars, Taylor Guitars, Collings Guitars, Strymon, Boss, Yamaha, Earthquaker, JAM Pedals, Warm Audio, Ampeg and dozens more!

item.title: Ibanez SR 505 Mahogany Basso Elettrico 5 Corde — $563.97
item.description:
$563.97 · Very Good · E-Musicstore Strumenti Musicali Forli'

Ibanez SR 505 Mahogany Basso Elettrico 5 Corde
